special_mechanics.name: Ledge Grabbing
special_mechanics.description: Player can grab onto ledges and climb

special_mechanics.name: Elevator Mechanics
special_mechanics.description: Conrad can use elevators to change altitude

special_mechanics.name: Fall Damage
special_mechanics.description: Conrad dies if falling from great height, demonstrating realistic weakness and fall damage mechanics

special_mechanics.name: Multi-level Altitude
special_mechanics.description: Each level spans multiple screens with multiple levels of altitude requiring jumping, climbing, and dropping to lower levels

tier_notes: Tier 2 empirical/qualitative data. Sources describe gameplay mechanics and level design but contain no quantitative physics parameters. Game features rotoscoped animation providing fluid, realistic human movement similar to Prince of Persia. No ROM addresses or hex values documented for movement parameters.
sources_used: tcrf - Flashback: The Quest for Identity (SNES)
